title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK for chatting, embedding, pulling and managing Ollama models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Node, Deno & browsers that talks to the Ollama REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich, self-hosted web interface for Ollama with chat UI, model management and multi-user support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot (vscode-ollama)
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into the editor as inline copilot-style assistance.

title: ollama-rag (privateGPT-ollama)
summary: PrivateGPT backend adapter that uses Ollama for local LLM and embeddings in a RAG pipeline.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes showing how to integrate Ollama with Flask, Next.js, Ray, Discord bots, etc.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs.

title: ollama-cli (rich-ollama)
summary: Terminal UI wrapper around Ollama built with Rich for prettier chat and logs.

title: ollama-gui (streamlit-ollama)
summary: Lightweight Streamlit chat GUI that talks to local Ollama models with session memory.

title: ollama-npm (unofficial npm wrapper)
summary: Small npm package that downloads and wraps the ollama binary for Node projects.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistent model storage.

title: ollama-docker (official image)
summary: Official Docker image with CUDA and CPU variants for running Ollama server in containers.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API with tokio/hyper.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app integrating Ollama for chat completions and embeddings with admin UI.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama supporting chat, completions and model management in C#.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts via Ollama inside notes and get inline completions.

title: ollama-reddit discussion
summary: Reddit thread announcing Ollama v0.1.40 with native tool-calling support and community examples.
